summary: Five new REST endpoints: GET /v1/alerts/history, PUT /v1/alerts/config, GET /v1/recommendations, GET /v1/analytics/daily. Wires alerts.configure_rules, recommendations engine, and forecasting prep checklist. Fixes missing RAW_TOPICS import in ETL transform (pre-existing test failure). 4 new tests, 215 total passing.

interfaceChanges.description: GET /v1/alerts/history — paginated alert history with alert_type and payload
PUT /v1/alerts/config — upsert per-shop alert rules via alerts.configure_rules
GET /v1/recommendations — active recommendations with Vietnamese message and CTA
GET /v1/analytics/daily — yesterday profit by SKU and low-stock prep checklist
Import RAW_TOPICS in transform.py so ETL topic guard resolves

mappings.criterion: AC1 — GET /v1/alerts/history returns paginated alert history for the active shop
AC2 — PUT /v1/alerts/config allows creating/updating alert rules and thresholds per shop
AC3 — GET /v1/recommendations returns current recommendations with CTAs for the active shop
AC4 — GET /v1/analytics/daily returns yesterday's profit breakdown by SKU

recommendations.message: Recommendation refresh creates new rows on empty shop; consider upsert-by-type to avoid table growth in production.
